name: idea-conversation
description: Nightly conversation pass - Stackz and Smoke read all idea notes in Agency HQ/Ideas/, reply to new messages, and update morning brief with conversation summaries
purpose: Read and reply before planning any build work

steps.name: Stackz Reads All Ideas
steps.action: Scan every note in Agency HQ/Ideas/ folder. Read full thread context.

steps.name: Stackz Checks Timestamps
steps.action: Compare Jaleel's last message timestamp vs Stackz's last reply timestamp in each note

steps.name: Stackz Replies Where Needed
steps.action: For each note where Jaleel newer: answer questions, ask clarifications (max 2), acknowledge new ideas, report build outcomes, propose approaches, or flag blockers

steps.name: Smoke Reads Notes
steps.action: Read all idea notes and Stackz's replies. Review full thread context.

steps.name: Smoke Identifies Concerns
steps.action: Flag: risks, scope issues, side effects on other systems, complexity concerns, reasonable timeline

steps.name: Smoke Replies Where Needed
steps.action: Reply only when has meaningful input: concerns about Stackz's approach, unintended side effects, scope reasonableness, tradeoff flags. Does not reply to every thread.

steps.name: Update Note Frontmatter
steps.action: For each note with activity: update status field (open/needs_clarification/in_progress/actioned/deferred) and last_updated timestamp

steps.name: Check for Stuck Threads
steps.action: Identify threads open 3+ nights with no resolution. Prepare explanation for why stuck.

steps.name: Write Morning Brief Section
steps.action: Create 'Conversation Updates' section in morning brief. Summarize each active note: title, status, 1-2 sentence discussion summary, Obsidian link.

steps.name: Send Notification
steps.action: Notify Jaleel: 'Conversation pass complete. X notes updated. Check morning brief for summary.'
